name: saga_nodes
description: Saga-map level tile set, knitted square tiles with soft rounded corners, same family, in this cell order: 1) CURRENT = glowing green knitted tile with gentle rim light; 2) DEFAULT = plain cream knitted tile; 3) LOCKED = muted grey-cream knitted tile with a small stitched felt padlock; 4) COMPLETE = warm gold knitted tile with a felt star patch. Solid closed silhouettes, no chains, no baked numbers.
prompt_extra: identical tile shape, corner radius, outline and lighting across all four cells; no numbers or letters on the tiles

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
